task_description: Migrate Kiro Quest from Cloudflare Workers to AWS (S3 + CloudFront) and evolve the architecture to include serverless backend (Lambda + API Gateway), DynamoDB for persistence, Cognito for Gmail SSO authentication, IaC with CDK, CI/CD with GitHub Actions, and DNS/HTTPS with Route 53 + ACM. All optimized for AWS Free Tier (zero or low cost).

verification.summary: All verification passes. npm run build succeeds (produces properly code-split dist/). npm run typecheck clean. Frontend tests: 187 passed, 1 pre-existing failure (getQuestionById - unrelated to changes). Backend tests: 20 passed. CDK synth succeeds for all 4 stacks (FrontendStack, AuthStack, BackendStack, GitHubOidcStack). Backend tsc --noEmit clean. Infra tsc --noEmit clean. YAML workflow validation passes.
